name: taikoxyz
description: Official Taiko plugins for AI agents - deploy smart contracts and run nodes on Taiko networks

metadata.description: Official Taiko plugins for AI agents - deploy smart contracts and run nodes on Taiko networks

plugins.name: taiko
plugins.description: Deploy, test, and interact with smart contracts on Taiko networks (Type-1 ZK-EVM rollup on Ethereum)

plugins.name: taiko-node
plugins.description: Set up, run, and manage Taiko nodes on Hoodi testnet or mainnet using Docker or from source

plugins.name: taiko-shadow
plugins.description: Privacy-preserving ETH transfer specialist for Taiko using ZK proofs to unlink sender from recipient

plugins.name: taiko-x402
plugins.description: x402 HTTP payment integration specialist for Taiko — build payment-protected APIs and AI agent clients using USDC facilitators
